SEARCH
Module JDA.Autoregister
Package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem

Class TaskRegistrar

java.lang.Object
de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem.TaskRegistrar
All Implemented Interfaces:
FeatureRegistrar
public class TaskRegistrar extends Object implements FeatureRegistrar
Automated registry for background tasks scheduled via annotations.

This class implements FeatureRegistrar to discover methods annotated with Task via reflection. It calculates the necessary delays and manages a ScheduledExecutorService to execute these tasks at their specified times.

Requirements:
  • Methods must be annotated with Task.
  • Methods must be public, return void, and have no parameters.
  • The declaring class must provide a public no-args constructor.
Lifecycle Management: Use register(JDA, Reflections) to start the scheduler and shutdown(JDA) to gracefully terminate background threads and ensure the application can exit cleanly.

  • Method Details

    • register

      public void register(net.dv8tion.jda.api.JDA jda, org.reflections.Reflections reflections)
      Scans for Task annotations and initializes the background scheduler.
      Specified by:
      register in interface FeatureRegistrar
      Parameters:
      jda - The JDA instance (unused for tasks, but part of the registrar contract).
      reflections - The pre-scanned reflection metadata.

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown(net.dv8tion.jda.api.JDA jda)
      Shuts down the internal scheduler and waits for active tasks to finish.

      Implements a tiered shutdown (shutdown -> wait -> shutdownNow) to prevent orphaned background threads.

      Specified by:
      shutdown in interface FeatureRegistrar
      Parameters:
      jda - The JDA instance.

    • getCommands

      public List<net.dv8tion.jda.api.interactions.commands.build.SlashCommandData> getCommands()
      Specified by:
      getCommands in interface FeatureRegistrar
